description_text: 10PCS Black Bumper Universal Vortex Generator Shark Fin Diffuser Car Roof Spoiler Features: 100% brand new and high quality. ABS plastic material, high hardness, impact resistant and heat resistant. Unique appearance and peaceful match, a good decoration for car. Can effectively reduce airflow noise and make driving quieter. Suitable for most cars, trucks, off-road vehicles, trailers, etc. Specifications: Material: ABS Color: Black Size: Approx.52.5*23*22mm Package Include: 10pcs x Car Roof Shark Fins
